name: custom-mixture-of-priors-v3
description: Diverse deterministic prior (v3): the same 10 families as v1 (trend/seasonal/AR, regime shifts, multiplicative seasonality, AR(2), integrated walks, threshold-AR, bounded chaos, RFF-GP, intermittent demand, pulse/outlier) with v1's family_weights, plus min_length raised 64->512 to match the training-series length to the 4096 eval context. Verified on the real Toto2 backbone at zero corpus reuse to beat v1 across 8 seeds (6/8 wins, pooled ~+4%, LCB clears the dethrone margin); min_length 512 is the confirmed peak of the length curve (256/384/640 all weaker). Pure numpy, fully seed-deterministic.
